summary: UI & Document Polish Pass - All 3 focus areas verified: (1) Contact details in branding settings working, (2) Multi-page PDF CSS present, (3) Logo embedding in stamps working. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Admin login, Settings Hub, Invoice Branding section with contact fields, stamp generation with embedded logo all verified. Customer portal: login, invoices, orders, quotes all working.
critical_code_review_comments: invoice_branding_routes.py: GET endpoint correctly merges DEFAULT_BRANDING for missing fields including contact_email, contact_phone, contact_address
invoice_branding_routes.py: _load_icon_b64() correctly loads and embeds logo as base64 in SVG stamps
pdf_generation_routes.py: _header_block correctly reads contact info from branding and renders in contact-bar
pdf_generation_routes.py: _css() has @page rule for A4 size and page-break-inside: avoid for table rows
InvoiceBrandingSettings.jsx: Contact fields (email, phone, address) at top of form with proper defaults
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 focus areas from this iteration are verified: (1) Contact details (email, phone, address) in Invoice Branding settings - GET returns defaults, POST saves and persists. (2) Multi-page PDF support - @page CSS rule with A4 size and page-break-inside: avoid on table rows. (3) Logo embedding in stamps - both circle and square stamps have clipPath and base64 image elements. Icon file at /app/backend/uploads/branding/ybvjms74_IMG_8680.jpeg. Test invoice ID: 69c25f9451b9095b5b27a029.

GATE_1_CONTACT_FIELDS_GET.details: GET /api/admin/settings/invoice-branding returns contact_email, contact_phone, contact_address with defaults

GATE_2_CONTACT_FIELDS_POST.details: POST /api/admin/settings/invoice-branding saves and returns all contact fields

GATE_3_CONTACT_FIELDS_PERSIST.details: Contact fields persist correctly via GET after POST

GATE_4_CIRCLE_STAMP_LOGO.details: Circle stamp SVG has clipPath id='iconClip' and image element with base64 data

GATE_5_SQUARE_STAMP_LOGO.details: Square stamp SVG has clipPath id='sqClip' and image element with base64 data

GATE_6_PDF_PAGE_CSS.details: Invoice preview has @page { size: A4; margin: 28px 0; } CSS rule

GATE_7_PDF_PAGE_BREAK.details: Invoice preview has page-break-inside: avoid on .items-table tbody tr

GATE_8_PDF_CONTACT_BAR.details: Invoice preview has contact-bar section with dynamic contact info from branding

GATE_11_CUSTOMER_INVOICES.details: Customer can view invoices list at /dashboard/invoices

GATE_12_CUSTOMER_ORDERS.details: Customer can view orders list at /account/orders

GATE_13_CUSTOMER_QUOTES.details: Customer can view quotes list at /dashboard/quotes

GATE_14_SETTINGS_HUB_BRANDING.details: Admin Settings Hub loads Invoice Branding section with contact fields at top

GATE_15_INVOICE_PDF_DOWNLOAD.details: GET /api/pdf/invoices/{id} returns PDF with correct content-type
